docs.title: Digital Linguistics Playbook
docs.text: Welcome to Damjan's chamber of digital secrets. Please use the navigation bar on the left or the search function. Didn't find what you were looking for? Give us a shout at damjan@posteo.de.

docs.title: About
docs.text: Who we are.

docs.title: Howto
docs.text: Videos and guidelines on how to do digital magic.

docs.title: Scenarios
docs.text: This page offers a number of scenarios in which young, aspiring digital linguists might find themselves, with possible solutions, links and tips.

docs.title: Audio
docs.text: Welcome to the toolkit. Please have a look around on the left or use the search function.

docs.title: Automation
docs.text: Welcome to the toolkit. Please have a look around on the left or use the search function.

docs.title: _Custom_stop_word_list_for_spaCy
docs.text: When to use Improve NLP preprocessing. Input Corpus Tools spaCy Steps Build frequency list ▸ Manual prune ▸ update(set) Output stopwords.json Pro tips Maintain per‑domain lists.

docs.title: CAT Tools
docs.text: Welcome to the toolkit. Please have a look around on the left or use the search function.

docs.title: Import_termbase_into_memoQ
docs.text: When to use Enable term recognition in translation grid. Input *.tbx or *.csv Tools memoQ Steps Resources ▸ Termbases ▸ Import ▸ Map languages Output Active termbase Pro tips Set deprecated terms to “Forbidden”.

docs.title: Batch_convert_subtitle_formats_Subtitle_Edit_
docs.text: When to use Need SRT, VTT, ASS in one go. Input Master *.srt Tools Subtitle Edit Steps Select files ▸ Choose target formats ▸ Run Output Multiple subtitle files Pro tips Enable “Maintain time‑codes”.

docs.title: Auto_timestamp_video_with_Whisper
docs.text: When to use Generate Spanish subs from scratch. Input video.mp4 Tools Subtitle Edit, Whisper Steps Load video ▸ Choose model ▸ Generate Output Timed Spanish SRT Pro tips GPU speeds up ~70 %.

docs.title: _Standardise_project_file_naming
docs.text: When to use Ensure reproducible pipelines. Input Mixed files Tools Bulk Rename Utility Steps Regex: {code}_{lang}_{ver}.ext Output Consistent names Pro tips Describe pattern in README.

docs.title: _Align_bilingual_docs_with_LF_Aligner
docs.text: When to use Create TM from document pairs. Input doc_en.txt + doc_es.txt Tools LF Aligner Steps Choose files ▸ Language pair ▸ Align Output aligned.tmx Pro tips Enable Google MT hints.

docs.title: _Build_TM_with_OmegaT
docs.text: When to use Free, cross‑platform TM creation. Input Folders source/ + target/ Tools OmegaT Steps New project ▸ Add files ▸ Align Output project_save.tmx Pro tips Split large TMs by domain.

docs.title: Corpora
docs.text: Welcome to the toolkit. Please have a look around on the left or use the search function.

docs.title: _Scrape_single_topic_website
docs.text: When to use Build niche corpus fast. Input Seed URLs in seeds.txt Tools requests, BeautifulSoup, readability-lxml Steps python scrape.py --seeds seeds.txt --depth 1 Output Folder of clean TXT Pro tips Respect robots.txt; sleep between hits.

docs.title: _Filter_Common_Crawl_with_CC_Net
docs.text: When to use Create large clean monolingual corpus. Input Common Crawl dump list Tools CC‑Net, fastText Steps cc_net download ... ▸ cc_net clean ... Output Deduplicated JSONL Pro tips Raise min_len for quality.

docs.title: _Sentence_align_EuroParl_with_hunalign
docs.text: When to use Build parallel MT data. Input EuroParl XML pair Tools hunalign, EuroParl Steps Strip XML ▸ hunalign ... Output aligned.txt Pro tips Use dictionary for recall.

docs.title: MT-Evaluation Scenarios
docs.text: Welcome to the toolkit. Please have a look around on the left or use the search function.

docs.title: _Evaluate_MT_with_COMET_22
docs.text: When to use Human‑oriented SOTA metric. Input src,mt,ref Tools COMET Steps comet evaluate ... Output comet_scores.csv Pro tips Bootstrap 95 % CI.

docs.title: NLP
docs.text: Welcome to the toolkit. Please have a look around on the left or use the search function.

docs.title: _Cross_lingual_embeddings_with_fastText
docs.text: When to use Compare semantic similarity across languages. Input Sentence lists Tools fastText Steps fasttext print-word-vectors ... Output vecs.tsv Pro tips Use PCA for plotting.

docs.title: _Entity_extraction_with_spaCy
docs.text: When to use Generate terminology seeds. Input TXT files Tools spaCy, pandas Steps Run NER ▸ Save to CSV Output entities.csv Pro tips Filter by POS pattern.

docs.title: PDF
docs.text: Welcome to the toolkit. Please have a look around on the left or use the search function.

docs.title: _Bulk_download_PDFs_OCR
docs.text: When to use Harvest scanned PDFs to text. Input CSV of PDF URLs Tools wget, Tesseract OCR, pdfimages, pdftoppm Steps wget -i links.csv -P pdfs ▸ OCR images Output ./ocr_text/.txt Pro tips* Use --psm 6 for columns.

docs.title: Subtitling
docs.text: Welcome to the toolkit. Pick a workflow from the list on the left or use the search bar. Anything missing? Let me know.

docs.title: _Translate_subtitles_via_DeepL_MKVToolNix
docs.text: When to use Quick bilingual subtitles. Input es.srt Tools DeepL plugin, MKVToolNix Steps Auto‑translate ▸ Save en.srt ▸ mkvmerge ... Output MKV with selectable subs Pro tips Use --language 0:spa.

docs.title: _Harvest_bilingual_subtitles_via_OpenSubtitles
docs.text: When to use Obtain colloquial parallel lines. Input Movie IDs Tools OpenSubtitles API, pysrt Steps Download subs ▸ Align timelines Output subtitles.jsonl Pro tips Filter CPS >20.

docs.title: _Auto_subtitle_burn_in_with_FFmpeg
docs.text: When to use Create bilingual hard‑sub video. Input video.mp4 Tools Whisper, FFmpeg Steps Whisper ▸ Translate ▸ ffmpeg ... subtitles= Output out.mp4 Pro tips Use -crf 23 to compress.

docs.title: Terminology
docs.text: Welcome to the toolkit. Please have a look around on the left or use the search function.

docs.title: Import terminology Excel → TBX
docs.text:
When to use Need a standards-compliant TBX from a spreadsheet. Input glossary.xlsx (columns: ID, EN, ES, Definition) Tools Glossary Converter

Steps

  1. Drag file onto Glossary Converter.
  2. Map columns.
  3. Select TBX-Basic → Convert.

Output glossary.tbx

Pro tip

Tick Generate term IDs if your sheet lacks them.

docs.title: Bulk_clean_glossary_in_Excel_Power_Query_
docs.text: When to use Remove duplicates, trim spaces, unify casing. Input glossary.xlsx Tools Excel Power Query Steps Data › Get & Transform ▸ “Trim/Clean” ▸ “Remove duplicates” Output Clean sheet ready for TBX Pro tips Record steps so you can refresh with new data.

docs.title: Validate_TBX_with_TBXChecker
docs.text: When to use Catch malformed XML before publishing. Input *.tbx Tools TBXChecker Steps Open file ▸ Click “Validate” Output Log of errors/warnings Pro tips Fix critical errors first.

docs.title: Convert_TBX_SDL_MultiTerm
docs.text: When to use Share a termbase with Trados users. Input glossary.tbx Tools SDL MultiTerm Convert Steps Launch wizard ▸ “TBX‑BASIC” ▸ Finish Output glossary.sdltb Pro tips Stick to UTF‑8 to avoid diacritics issues.

docs.title: Version_control_termbase_with_Git
docs.text: When to use Track edits & collaborate asynchronously. Input *.tbx Tools Git, Git LFS Steps git lfs track "*.tbx" ▸ commit ▸ push Output History with diffs Pro tips Use git diff --color-words for readable changes.

docs.title: Forbidden_term_QA_in_CAT_tool
docs.text: When to use Enforce branding or regulatory compliance. Input Translation project Tools memoQ QA, Trados QA Checker Steps Add term list ▸ Run QA Output Violation report Pro tips Mark as Critical to block delivery.

docs.title: _Extract_term_candidates_with_AntConc
docs.text: When to use Seed a new termbase. Input Corpus TXT Tools AntConc Steps Set min freq 5 ▸ Export bigrams Output terms.csv Pro tips Filter stop‑words first.

docs.title: _Generate_terminology_with_Termostat
docs.text: When to use Contrastive term extraction. Input Specialised vs. general corpus Tools Termostat Steps Upload corpora ▸ Compute key terms Output Ranked list Pro tips Log‑likelihood is robust.

docs.title: _Interactive_term_frequency_dashboard
docs.text: When to use Stakeholder‑friendly live filtering. Input term_count.csv Tools Observable Plot Steps Upload CSV ▸ Plot.barY Output Web dashboard Pro tips Cache dataset in gist.

docs.title: Visualization
docs.text: Welcome to the toolkit. Pick a workflow from the list on the left or use the search bar. Anything missing? Let me know.

docs.title: _Visualise_frequency_list_with_Voyant
docs.text: When to use Quickly show word clouds. Input Corpus Tools Voyant Tools Steps Upload ▸ “Cirrus” Output Interactive visual Pro tips Export SVG.

docs.title: _Sentence_similarity_heat_map
docs.text: When to use Track topic drift over series. Input Sentences list Tools sentence-transformers, Matplotlib Steps Encode ▸ Cos matrix ▸ imshow Output heatmap.png Pro tips Cluster reorder for clarity.
